trackedIssues.title: docs(release): capture rollout, rollback, and production closeout evidence

evidence.note: The release closeout evidence runbook provides the operational handoff artifact and closure discipline.
Stable external HTTPS origin and provider ownership are not available yet.
Latest Render readiness refresh confirms workspace, project, and Production environment exist, but no services/databases exist and Blueprint validation is blocked by need_payment_info.
Read-only alternate-target inventory found no existing Vercel or Netlify Agentic deployment; Render remains the only repo-prepared target path.

Post-PR #899 stable-ingress refresh confirms the sync URL is still temporary, no stable deployed origin is configured, Render services are absent, and Blueprint validation is still blocked by need_payment_info.
Post-PR #901 stable-ingress refresh confirms the same external blockers with current origin/main, release/remediation validators, and live preflight collection.
Post-PR #903 correction reopens the stable-ingress issue after GitHub keyword parsing closed it even though stable ingress proof remains unavailable.

Post-PR #904 stable-ingress refresh confirms the sync URL remains temporary, no stable smoke origin is configured, Render services are absent, Blueprint validation is still blocked by need_payment_info, and no deployed health/readiness proof exists.

validationGates.notes: Run after the production-like target has a stable HTTPS base URL and trusted proxy header contract.

evidence.note: Target Postgres is not available while provider creation is blocked.
Post-PR #899 Postgres/shared-auth refresh confirms DATABASE_URL and AGENTIC_ACCESS_KEY are unavailable in live proof and no target database exists for migration or status checks.
Post-PR #901 Postgres/shared-auth refresh confirms no target database exists for db:migrate, db:status --require-ready, health, or readiness proof.

Post-PR #904 Postgres/shared-auth refresh confirms DATABASE_URL and AGENTIC_ACCESS_KEY remain unavailable in live proof and no target database exists for migration, status, health, or readiness proof.

validationGates.notes: Run against the target DATABASE_URL only after the managed database exists.

evidence.note: No stable target exists for external smoke validation.
Post-PR #899 stable-ingress refresh confirms no stable deployed origin exists for health/readiness smoke proof.
Post-PR #901 stable-ingress refresh confirms no deployed health/readiness target exists because Render services are absent and Blueprint validation remains blocked.

Post-PR #904 stable-ingress refresh confirms no deployed health/readiness target exists because the sync URL is still temporary, no stable smoke origin is configured, Render services are absent, and Blueprint validation remains blocked.

validationGates.notes: Run after AGENTIC_SMOKE_BASE_URL points to the stable deployed target.

evidence.note: Deployed worker durability is not available until the target web and worker processes exist.
Post-PR #899 deployed-worker refresh confirms Render services are absent and no deployed worker can claim, complete, or safely fail a github_issue_intake job yet.
Post-PR #901 deployed-worker refresh confirms no deployed worker service, shared durable state, or live job settlement proof is available yet.

Post-PR #904 deployed-worker refresh confirms Render services remain absent, DATABASE_URL is missing from live proof, no stable deployed origin exists, and no github_issue_intake job can be settled by a deployed worker.

validationGates.notes: Run after the deployed worker writes fresh heartbeat and can complete queued jobs.

evidence.note: Merged preflight fails closed until the stable sync URL, active workflow, runtime config names, Render web/worker services, and Blueprint validation evidence are available.
Read-only collector gathers workflow state, sync URL, GitHub Actions secret names, Render services, and Blueprint validation before running the same fail-closed preflight.
Current live preflight still fails because the sync URL is a temporary tunnel, the workflow is disabled, Render has no services, and Blueprint validation returns need_payment_info.
Latest completion audit maps #141 through #145 acceptance criteria to repo evidence and confirms only external deployment/runtime prerequisites remain.
Latest roadmap evidence refresh links PRs #894 through #898, current origin/main CI, local validation, live preflight blockers, and remaining external setup requirements.
Post-PR #899 runtime-config refresh confirms the stable sync URL, active workflow, provider runtime config names, and live fail-closed auth proof are still missing.
Post-PR #899 live-sync refresh records the focused route/sync/preflight tests, release/remediation validation, and current live preflight failures before manual dispatch.
Post-PR #899 completion audit maps the current repo-side green state to remaining live deployment/runtime acceptance criteria across #141 through #145.
Post-PR #901 runtime-config refresh confirms the stable sync URL, active workflow, provider runtime config names, smoke key, and live fail-closed auth proof are still missing.
Post-PR #901 live-sync refresh records current live preflight failures before any workflow re-enable or manual dispatch.
Post-PR #901 roadmap refresh records current origin/main, latest evidence package counts, live preflight collection, and remaining external deployment/runtime blockers.
Post-PR #904 runtime-config refresh confirms the stable sync URL, active workflow, provider runtime config names, smoke key, allowlist, and live fail-closed auth proof are still missing.
Post-PR #904 live-sync refresh records current live preflight failures before any workflow enablement or manual dispatch.
Post-PR #904 roadmap refresh records current origin/main, latest evidence package counts, live preflight collection, and remaining external deployment/runtime blockers.

Final audit on origin/main dd7a28e still fails live preflight: temporary sync host, missing deployed origin, disabled workflow, missing runtime config names, absent Render services, and Render need_payment_info.

Post-PR #903 clean origin/main preflight still fails on temporary sync host, missing deployed origin, disabled workflow, missing runtime config names, missing smoke key and allowlist, absent Render services, and Render need_payment_info.

Post-PR #904 clean origin/main preflight still fails on temporary sync host, missing deployed origin, disabled workflow, missing runtime config names, missing smoke key and allowlist, absent Render services, and Render need_payment_info.

validationGates.notes: Run on implementation branches before PR review; hosted CI remains the merge gate when available.

rollout.targetSummary: Provider-backed production-like target is not created yet; Render validation reaches the provider but returns need_payment_info before resource creation.
rolloutSteps: Unlock provider billing and confirm account owner, environment name, stable HTTPS hostname, rollback authority, and trusted proxy header behavior.
Create or sync the provider resources from deploy/render/render.yaml with Auto Sync disabled for first rollout.
Run migrations and db status against the target database before app startup.
Deploy the same release artifact to web and worker, then verify /api/health and /api/ready from outside the deployment boundary.
Run deployment smoke, async canary, GitHub App sync canary, and rollout-gate validation before marking traffic healthy.
rollbackSteps: Stop routing new traffic to the current release.
Restore the previous known-good application image or release artifact for both web and worker.
Re-run /api/health and /api/ready against the restored target.
Re-run deployment smoke, async canary, and rollout-gate validation against the restored target.
Keep additive schema changes in place unless a separately tested operator-approved data rollback plan exists.

disablement.action: Disable the scheduled workflow or clear the stable sync URL until live sync proof is restored.

evidence.note: Deployment runbook requires waiting for a stable URL before enabling the GitHub App sync URL.

disablement.action: Restore the previous web and worker release artifact and keep schema rollback manual.

evidence.note: Rollback section defines traffic restore, smoke rerun, and schema rollback constraints.

secretRotation.action: Rotate the target smoke key through the provider and matching GitHub secret, then rerun smoke validation without recording the value.

evidence.note: Runbook maps STAGING_SMOKE_ACCESS_KEY to the runtime smoke key without exposing values.

secretRotation.action: Rotate the runtime sync secret and repository secret together, then rerun the sync canary against the stable target.

evidence.note: Threat model requires side-effect evidence and rollback or disablement instructions without copying raw secret values.

residualRisks.title: No production-like provider target exists yet
residualRisks.mitigation: Do not close #137 or promote live rollout claims until the provider target exists, ingress is stable, and smoke evidence is attached.

residualRisks.title: Postgres and shared-auth proof is static/local until target database exists
residualRisks.mitigation: Keep #143 open and rerun db status plus production bootstrap check against the target DATABASE_URL after provider unlock.

residualRisks.title: Worker durability and live GitHub sync proof require deployed web and worker
residualRisks.mitigation: Keep #144 and #145 open until async canary, GitHub sync canary, and rollout telemetry pass against stable ingress.

evidenceHooks.note: Combines deployment smoke, async canary, and retained telemetry rollout-gate evidence.
Validates retained telemetry against checked-in rollout gate thresholds.
